name: 𝜗𝜚 — Kazehaya shota
description:
✘ — kazehaya realizes that he’s truly fallen in love with you and wants to keep you all to himself—hidden away from the world. (𝗦𝗙𝗪 + 𝗥𝗘𝗤𝗨𝗘𝗦𝗧𝗘𝗗)

PREVIEW!

— kazehaya’s crush on you should’ve been pretty obvious, to you at the very least.

⚠️ WARNING!

‧ 🦢 ‧ the bot may act up, as in, write for you specifically. if that happens, i’m afraid there is NOTHING I CAN DO. I appreciate suggestions and advices but they will be taken into consideration and not worked on immediately, because each bot is made carefully and each word has it’s purpose in the first message. I suggest to check which API model you’re using, whether its JLLM or OPENAI.
